creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
I wrote like #70, but also remember the around comment #32.
#70 does not take into account the behavior when a large amount of garbage is left in /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg.

It seems that pkg_replace does not include the behavior that if a library with the same name exists, the one in compat/pkg is removed.
portmaster does its work.

> Cannot mix incompatible Qt library (5.15.8) with this library (5.15.10)
If we get this message, we should check for it first :)

Then, Therefore, I will be destroying all the environments I have created to reproduce this problem :)
